REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION, CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2023 NO APPEARANCES. THE REPORT OF STATUS AND PETITION FOR ADDITIONAL TIME FOR ESTATE ADMINISTRATION FILED BY MEREDITH DURHAM IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. AN ORDER TO APPEAR WILL BE ISSUED TO THE ADMINISTRATOR MEREDITH DURHAM AND HER ATTORNEY HOWARD KANE TO APPEAR ON NOVEMBER 21, 2023, AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 204. STATUS ON CLOSE OF THE ESTATE IS ALSO SET FOR NOVEMBER 21, 2023, AT 9:00 A.M. JUDGE: RONLD E. QUIDACHAY. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. DEPUTY: JAIME. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To Jul-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Kane appeared by zoom for and with Meredith Durham (petitioner).

The Court addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Kane stated that Inventory and Appraisal are complete, that he needs to file a brief supplement, and that all creditors' claims have been satisfied. Report and status and petition for additional time for administration is continued to July 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Howard Kane appeared via zoom for and with Meredith Durham (administrator).

Mr. Kane stated that he needs more time to file the Petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to January 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by December 26, 2023. Order of status hearing is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that the matter was on for Report of Status and Petition for Additional Time for Estate Administration which was filed by Petitioner Meredith Durham.

No appearances. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Meredith Durham and her Attorney Howard Kane to appear on November 21, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear.

The subject petition is ordered off calendar and a new petition is to be filed with payment of a filing fee. Status on close of the estate is also set for November 21, 2023, at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Ronld E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.
